sizing_rule.note: Position size = optimal_f × probability-weighted price differential / strike, volatility-adjusted by SD(HPRs). Formulas differ for long vs short. Requires pre-calculated optimal f from historical testing and HPR distribution (arithmetic/geometric means).

source_rule_text: Position sizing for options and underlying instruments should be based on the tested optimal f value multiplied by the probability-weighted theoretical price differential, adjusted for the standard deviation derived from arithmetic and geometric average HPRs.
